Container.Name: qt-autotrader
Container.Overview: QT Auto-Trader: self-hosted momentum trading bot for stocks and crypto via Alpaca. Paper-trading first, all configuration through the web UI. GPLv3.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the QT web interface

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Database, encrypted API keys, trade history. BACK THIS UP.
